assumptions.value: target-house-2.png is treated as the primary visual target for target-house-3; it shows the same floorplan from the opposite/front-right axonometric corner, so the saved main camera is shifted to positive X and negative Y.
Floorplan dimensions 14 m by 10 m override earlier approximate brief dimensions for target-house-2.
The folded wrapper is assembled from typed walls, an asymmetric roof, frame sweeps/recesses, and return walls until a native folded-shell primitive exists.
Interior programme assets are plan/render proxy markers, not manufacturer-specific furniture.

meta.intent: Methodology-authored target-house-3 seed from target-house-2.png and the image-locked target-house floorplan: front-right axonometric of the thick white folded upper shell, recessed loggia, roof-court void, vertical-clad base, carport, stair, rooms, interior programme assets, materials, views, and documentation, revised to avoid target-house-2 clearance and physical clash warnings.

materialIntent.surface: continuous folded upper wrapper, roof plane, fascia, side walls, loggia frame, roof-court returns, and plinth
materialIntent.evidence: target-house-2.png shows the upper wall and roof as one smooth matte white wrapper, not a dark pitched roof.

materialIntent.surface: ground-floor base cladding and central upper loggia pier
materialIntent.evidence: target-house-2.png and floorplan call out the vertically clad lower base and feature cladding screen.

materialIntent.surface: roof court / terrace walking surface and exposed slab edges
materialIntent.evidence: the roof court reads as a flat occupied terrace floor inside the roof cutout.

materialIntent.surface: large loggia glazing, ground sliding doors, roof-court door, and roof-court guard
materialIntent.evidence: target-house-2.png uses grey transparent glazing across the loggia, lower living area, and roof-court void.

materialIntent.surface: thin balcony and stair guard linework plus aluminium frames
materialIntent.evidence: the sketch has crisp dark mullions and black horizontal guard rails.
